mapper.sql: select process_id, project_code, project_name, mold_code, initiator, description, status, step1_status, step2_status, step3_status, step4_status, step5_status, step6_status, step7_status, step8_status, step1_deadline, step2_deadline, step3_deadline, step4_deadline, step5_deadline, step6_deadline, step7_deadline, step8_deadline, step1_responsible, step2_responsible, step3_responsible, step4_responsible, step5_responsible, step6_responsible, step7_responsible, step8_responsible, step1_files, step2_files, step3_files, step4_files, step5_files, step6_files, step7_files, step8_files, step1_comments, step2_comments, step3_comments, step4_comments, step5_comments, step6_comments, step7_comments, step8_comments, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from tech_trial_process
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tech_trial_process WHERE del_flag = '0' AND ( (step1_responsible = #{userName} AND step1_deadline IS NOT NULL AND step1_deadline <= CURDATE() AND (step1_status IS NULL OR step1_status != 'done')) OR (step2_responsible = #{userName} AND step2_deadline IS NOT NULL AND step2_deadline <= CURDATE() AND (step2_status IS NULL OR step2_status != 'done')) OR (step3_responsible = #{userName} AND step3_deadline IS NOT NULL AND step3_deadline <= CURDATE() AND (step3_status IS NULL OR step3_status != 'done')) OR (step4_responsible = #{userName} AND step4_deadline IS NOT NULL AND step4_deadline <= CURDATE() AND (step4_status IS NULL OR step4_status != 'done')) OR (step5_responsible = #{userName} AND step5_deadline IS NOT NULL AND step5_deadline <= CURDATE() AND (step5_status IS NULL OR step5_status != 'done')) OR (step6_responsible = #{userName} AND step6_deadline IS NOT NULL AND step6_deadline <= CURDATE() AND (step6_status IS NULL OR step6_status != 'done')) OR (step7_responsible = #{userName} AND step7_deadline IS NOT NULL AND step7_deadline <= CURDATE() AND (step7_status IS NULL OR step7_status != 'done')) OR (step8_responsible = #{userName} AND step8_deadline IS NOT NULL AND step8_deadline <= CURDATE() AND (step8_status IS NULL OR step8_status != 'done')) )

del_flag = '0' and project_code like concat('%', #{projectCode}, '%') and project_name like concat('%', #{projectName}, '%') and initiator like concat('%', #{initiator}, '%') and status = #{status}
order by create_time desc
where mold_code = #{moldCode} and del_flag = '0' order by process_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into tech_trial_process
project_code, project_name, mold_code, initiator, description, status, step1_status, step2_status, step3_status, step4_status, step5_status, step6_status, step7_status, step8_status, step1_deadline, step2_deadline, step3_deadline, step4_deadline, step5_deadline, step6_deadline, step7_deadline, step8_deadline, step1_responsible, step2_responsible, step3_responsible, step4_responsible, step5_responsible, step6_responsible, step7_responsible, step8_responsible, step1_files, step2_files, step3_files, step4_files, step5_files, step6_files, step7_files, step8_files, step1_comments, step2_comments, step3_comments, step4_comments, step5_comments, step6_comments, step7_comments, step8_comments, create_by, create_time, remark,
#{projectCode}, #{projectName}, #{moldCode}, #{initiator}, #{description}, #{status}, #{step1Status}, #{step2Status}, #{step3Status}, #{step4Status}, #{step5Status}, #{step6Status}, #{step7Status}, #{step8Status}, #{step1Deadline}, #{step2Deadline}, #{step3Deadline}, #{step4Deadline}, #{step5Deadline}, #{step6Deadline}, #{step7Deadline}, #{step8Deadline}, #{step1Responsible}, #{step2Responsible}, #{step3Responsible}, #{step4Responsible}, #{step5Responsible}, #{step6Responsible}, #{step7Responsible}, #{step8Responsible}, #{step1Files}, #{step2Files}, #{step3Files}, #{step4Files}, #{step5Files}, #{step6Files}, #{step7Files}, #{step8Files}, #{step1Comments}, #{step2Comments}, #{step3Comments}, #{step4Comments}, #{step5Comments}, #{step6Comments}, #{step7Comments}, #{step8Comments}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark},
mapper.delete: update tech_trial_process set del_flag = '2' where process_id = #{processId}

update tech_trial_process set del_flag = '2' where process_id in
#{processId}
